zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy St Aubyn於大約1281年出生在英國戴文格奧智哈姆時，他的父親Sir Mauger St Aubyn III29歲，母親Isabella Pidekeswell25歲。他於大約1313年與Margaret Sutton在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1345年享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy St Aubyn于大约1281年出生在英国戴文格奧智哈姆时，他的父亲Sir Mauger St Aubyn III29岁，母亲Isabella Pidekeswell25岁。他于大约1313年与Margaret Sutton在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1345年享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized spelling of French   St  .   Denis  .

variants.name: Denis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Camille, Jacques, Armand, Marcel, Andre, Pierre, Serge, Yvan, Alphonse, Edouard, Francois, Gaetane.  Spanish Jose, Carlos, Jorge, Roberto, Angel, Francisco, Joaquin, Juan, Manuel, Miguel, Ramon, Rolando.

French, Walloon, Breton, West Indian (mainly Haiti), German, Dutch, English, and Portuguese; Spanish and Galician (Denís): from the personal name Denis, Spanish and Galician Denís, from Latin Dionysius ‘(follower) of Dionysos’ (see Dennis ). Compare Dennee .
Ukrainian and Rusyn: variant transliteration of   Denys  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Aubyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Andre, Normand, Armand, Cecile, Emile, Henri, Monique, Adelard, Aime, Alcid, Aldege.

French: from the personal name Aubin (from Latin Albinus, a derivative of albus ‘white’). This was the name of several minor early Christian saints, including a famous bishop of Angers (died c. 554). At an early date, this name became confused with the ancient Germanic personal name Albuin (see Albin ). Compare Obey and Obin .

variants.name: Albin
meanings: English, French, and German: from the personal name Albin (from Latin Albinus, a derivative of albus ‘white’). In England this is generally a variant of Alban . The usual spelling of the French name is Aubin . The personal name was especially popular in Austria, Lombardy, and Savoy, where it absorbed the ancient Germanic name Albuin (which is composed of the elements alb ‘elf’ + win ‘friend’; compare Alvin ). This was the name of the Lombard leader (died 572) who made himself king of northern Italy, and also of various Christian saints, including a bishop of Brixen (Bressanone) in South Tyrol.
Galician (Albín): habitational name from any of the four places called Albín in Galicia (Spain), from Latin (villa) Albini.

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy St Aubyn was born about 1281, in Georgeham, Devon, England, his father, Sir Mauger St Aubyn III, was 29 and his mother, Isabella Pidekeswell, was 25. He married Margaret Sutton about 1313, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died about 1345, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy St Aubyn est né environ 1281, à Georgeham, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir Mauger St Aubyn III, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Isabella Pidekeswell, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Sutton environ 1313, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1345, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy St Aubyn um 1281 in Georgeham, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Mauger St Aubyn III 29 und seine Mutter Isabella Pidekeswell 25. Er hat um 1313 in Devon, England Margaret Sutton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1345 im Alter von 66 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy St Aubyn è nato il circa 1281 nel Georgeham, Devon, England, il suo padre, Sir Mauger St Aubyn III, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Pidekeswell, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Sutton circa 1313, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1345, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy St Aubynが約1281年にイギリスデボンジョージェハムで生まれた時，父Sir Mauger St Aubyn IIIは29歳，母Isabella Pidekeswellは25歳であった。約1313年にイギリスデボンでMargaret Suttonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1345年に66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy St Aubyn(이)가 대략 1281년 영국 데폰 조그함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Mauger St Aubyn III(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Pidekeswell(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1313년 영국 데폰에서 Margaret Sutton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1345년 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

mg.Abt 1281–ABT 1345: tany ho any amin'ny 1281–tany ho any amin'ny 1345

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy St Aubyn nasceu aproximadamente 1281, em Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Mauger St Aubyn III, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Pidekeswell, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Sutton aproximadamente 1313, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1345, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy St Aubyn родился около 1281 г. в местности джеоргэам, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Mauger St Aubyn III было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Pidekeswell, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Sutton около 1313 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1345 г. в возрасте 66 лет.

sm.Abt 1281–ABT 1345: e tusa o le 1281–e tusa o le 1345

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy St Aubyn nació aproximadamente 1281, en Georgeham, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Mauger St Aubyn III, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Isabella Pidekeswell, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Margaret Sutton aproximadamente 1313, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1345, a la edad de 66 años.
